name: Maximum Interest Rate on Related Party Land Sales

eligibility.description: Applies to sales of land between an individual and a family member (as defined in section 267(c)(4)) for the first $500,000 of sales price in a calendar year. Both parties must be U.S. persons.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Limits the imputed interest rate to a maximum of 6% compounded semiannually for certain land sales between family members, even if the Applicable Federal Rate (AFR) is higher.
